configurations.name: o-servus-dev
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22.23.1 && exec pnpm run start

configurations.name: o-servus-preview
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22.23.1 && exec ng serve --port 4201

configurations.name: o-servus-prod-preview
runtimeArgs: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22.23.1 && npx http-server dist/o-servus/browser -p 4202 -c-1
